name: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk
summary: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk engages in the transportation business in Indonesia. It offers land transportation services, such as loose cargo and container transportation; and export and import customs clearance for cargoes. The company also provides multi-modal transport services, including freight forwarding and load consolidation, as well as storage and warehousing services. It operates a fleet of 135 vehicles. The company was formerly known as PT Armada Beton. PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk was founded in 2012 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
